title: Section 4
content: Nothing in this Act shall apply to that portion of the Dehra Dun district called 1Jaunsar Bawar 2***
footnote: 1. “Jaunsar Bawar” was one of the Scheduled Districts of the State of Uttar Pradesh, see the Scheduled Districts Act, 1874 (14 of 1874), First Schedule, Pt. IV, but has ceased to be so under the Constitution of India. 2. The words “and referred to in s. 11 of Act 24 of 1864” rep. by Act 12 of 1891.
